example_tasks: Allocate budget between marketing and R&D
Differentiate between primary and secondary goals
Partition hard drive for dual boot
Structure presentation into two main sections
Divide research notes into theory and practice
Compare cloud storage vs local backup

Split meeting time between review and planning
Categorize tasks by urgency and importance
Allocate resources to two parallel projects
reasoning: The icon represents a clear division or comparison, making it useful for tasks involving categorization, splitting, or balancing two distinct entities or project phases.
